title: Tracking Event
description: Single tracking event for register_event. Composes harmonized event type (simplified status), definition type (info/exception/milestone), and optional codified meaning. See tracking-event-codes.schema.json and tracking-event-definitions.json.

eventType.description: Harmonized event type (simplified status). For codified codes, use codifiedMeaning.

definitionType.description: Semantic category: MILESTONE=key progression; INFO=informational; EXCEPTION=incident. Optional; default inferred from eventType.

codifiedMeaning.description: Reference to external standard (openPEPPOL, X12, EPCIS)
